findings:
  - { id: judged-feature-union-superseded-story-archive, kind: judged, text: "The superseded-story hole previously reported here is now adjudicated as disclose-and-exclude (ledger L-N12, checkFeatureSpecStaleCondition's supersededExtra lines riding every verdict), which cures the SILENCE — but the exclusion itself remains a semantic deviation from ac-4's declared truth-condition: an accepted deviation recorded in a superseded implementing story's archived report contributes exactly ZERO to the feature-close union, where ac-4 says 'counts exactly once, never zero and never twice' over EVERY implementing story's archived report, with no superseded carve-out in the spec's text. The rationale (supersession is the spec-stale counterweight's own prescribed remedy; the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced) is recorded only in the invention ledger and code comments — the provenance discipline's own machinery (an accepted-deviation disposition with a note on this report) is the sanctioned place to carry a deliberate divergence from an AC's literal text, so this is re-surfaced for that recorded human ruling rather than left to pass as if ac-4's universal quantifier held. (confidence 0.30)", disposition: accepted-deviation, note: "The recorded human ruling this finding requests (ledger L-N12, controller-adjudicated at the seventh round): a superseded implementing story's archived accepted-deviations are EXCLUDED from the feature-close union, disclosed by name on every verdict — never silently zero. Rationale: the spec-stale counterweight exists to force supersession over dispositioning-around; once supersession HAS occurred, the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced, so counting them would punish the budget's own prescribed remedy, while silence would launder them. ac-4's universal quantifier gains the superseded-story clause at the endgame ratification pass (with the P2-RT entries) — this disposition is the report-level record of the deliberate divergence until that text lands." }

The rationale (supersession is the spec-stale counterweight's own prescribed remedy; the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced) is recorded only in the invention ledger and code comments — the provenance discipline's own machinery (an accepted-deviation disposition with a note on this report) is the sanctioned place to carry a deliberate divergence from an AC's literal text, so this is re-surfaced for that recorded human ruling rather than left to pass as if ac-4's universal quantifier held.\",\n      \"confidence\": 0.3\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```" }

# Alignment report

## Computed

(none)

### Boundary diff vs acceptance baseline

(no impacted services)

### Diagram alignment

- (no accepted proposals)
- (no illustrative diagrams in this spec's body)

## Judged

- **judged-feature-union-superseded-story-archive** [accepted-deviation]: The superseded-story hole previously reported here is now adjudicated as disclose-and-exclude (ledger L-N12, checkFeatureSpecStaleCondition's supersededExtra lines riding every verdict), which cures the SILENCE — but the exclusion itself remains a semantic deviation from ac-4's declared truth-condition: an accepted deviation recorded in a superseded implementing story's archived report contributes exactly ZERO to the feature-close union, where ac-4 says 'counts exactly once, never zero and never twice' over EVERY implementing story's archived report, with no superseded carve-out in the spec's text. The rationale (supersession is the spec-stale counterweight's own prescribed remedy; the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced) is recorded only in the invention ledger and code comments — the provenance discipline's own machinery (an accepted-deviation disposition with a note on this report) is the sanctioned place to carry a deliberate divergence from an AC's literal text, so this is re-surfaced for that recorded human ruling rather than left to pass as if ac-4's universal quantifier held. (confidence 0.30) — The recorded human ruling this finding requests (ledger L-N12, controller-adjudicated at the seventh round): a superseded implementing story's archived accepted-deviations are EXCLUDED from the feature-close union, disclosed by name on every verdict — never silently zero. Rationale: the spec-stale counterweight exists to force supersession over dispositioning-around; once supersession HAS occurred, the predecessor's adjudications concern text the successor replaced, so counting them would punish the budget's own prescribed remedy, while silence would launder them. ac-4's universal quantifier gains the superseded-story clause at the endgame ratification pass (with the P2-RT entries) — this disposition is the report-level record of the deliberate divergence until that text lands.

### Candidates awaiting reaffirmation

(none)
